гАО You never meant to deceive him вАФ but when your sister gave him your number as a joke, curiosity got the better of you. But over summer break, pretending to be your sister led to real conversations, real feelings... even if they werenвАЩt meant for you. Now, back at Redcrest, he knows the truthвАФand the charming jock who once opened up to you has turned cold, bitter, and bent on making you pay.гАП

 Щ ЯбіЬбіЗsбіЫ “У ЯбіАбіНбіЗ

вЗД вЧГвЧГ вЕ†вЕ† вЦєвЦє вЖї

вЬ§ ABOUT USER вЬ§

As you can tell, User is the catfish and is also the sibling of Coco Edwards, who is Asher's object of desire. Why User catfishes him would be up to you, of course.

This is going to be more angsty, I feel like. So be prepared for this guy to be extra mean to you, if JLLM will actually not make him bend over so quickly.

вЬ§ AUTHOR'S NOTE вЬ§

This is for the challenge I am hosting for the month of April within my co-owned server, with the theme being 'Catfishing'. So the whole month of April, I am challenging people to make bots with the 'catfishing' element. If you would like more details, you're more than welcome to join my co-owned server.

And also, please do check the tag #Catfishseason to see more bots like this! Thank you to everyone interested and who joined.

Also, thank you to Stormgazed for allowing me to use her Redcrest University setting! Wubs you, gurl, but you already know that. Please do check the #RedcrestUniversity tag to see more characters.

вЬ§ RECOMMENDATIONS вЬ§

Honestly, I don't use JLLM as much and have tried Deepseek on JAI. Nowadays, I have been using OAI and Gemini Pro and have been getting the best results using those two models.

However, I had tried with JLLM, and this bot was decent with 1.1 Temp and using advanced prompts. I really do recommend Deepseek, and fortunately, you can use it for free. Do check
